meta.title: Istantrip — Live the Soul of Istanbul
meta.description: Bosphorus cruises, city tours, hotel reservations and VIP airport transfers. Curated experiences from the heart of Istanbul.

hero.title: Don't just see the city — live it.
hero.subtitle: From Hagia Sophia to Galata, Balat to Kuzguncuk — private tours crafted with local passion.

services.sectionSubtitle: Four services designed to complete your Istanbul journey.

bosphorus.title: Bosphorus Cruises
bosphorus.desc: Sunset cruises on private yachts, classic boat rides along the strait, and authentic village stops with unmatched views.

city.title: City Tours
city.desc: Walk the Historical Peninsula, Galata, Balat and Kadıköy with expert guides who tell the city's true story.

hotel.title: Hotel Reservations
hotel.desc: Comfortable, well-located and exclusive accommodation options through our boutique and luxury hotel partners.

transfer.title: Airport Transfer & VIP
transfer.desc: Seamless meet-and-greet and in-city transfers with comfortable vehicles and professional drivers.

tours.sectionSubtitle: A selection of our most-loved experiences.
tours.listSubtitle: The right way for you to explore Istanbul.

hotels.sectionSubtitle: Stays we've curated in Istanbul's most special districts.
hotels.listSubtitle: Boutique and luxury — accommodation prepared for you in Istanbul.

transfer.subtitle: Comfort that begins the moment you land.

features.title: VIP Meet & Greet
features.desc: Name-board welcome at the gate, luggage assistance.

features.title: Premium Vehicle
features.desc: Sedans and vans, air-conditioned and immaculately kept.

features.title: Fixed Price
features.desc: No surprises, no traffic tariffs — a guaranteed rate.

reservation.sectionSubtitle: Tell us what suits you best — we'll be back with you shortly.
reservation.success: We received your request. We'll get back to you shortly.
reservation.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

items.quote: Not just a tour but a genuine Istanbul experience. Our guide's love for the city showed in every detail.
items.author: Elif K.

items.quote: From airport pickup to our final yacht night, everything was flawlessly organized.
items.author: Michael R.

items.quote: We'll never forget that afternoon walking through the streets of Balat.
items.author: Yuki T.

gallery.subtitle: Through the lens of our guests and guides.

items.q: What languages are the tours in?
items.a: We offer guides in Turkish, English, Arabic and Russian.
Once your reservation is confirmed you can pay by credit card, transfer or cash.
Cancellations more than 48 hours before the tour are free.
Our private tours run 1–15 guests. For larger groups we build a custom plan.

about.body: Istantrip connects local passion with global vision. We craft tours that live, feel and tell Istanbul's story — opening the city's historical texture, modern face and hidden beauty to you.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: Our passionate bond with the city we were born in is the foundation of Istantrip. As local guides, experienced operators and a passionate team, we don't just show the city — we let you feel it.

values.title: Local
values.desc: Every guide keeps the city's real pulse.

values.title: Detail
values.desc: Curation at every step, from welcome to farewell.
